headline: How The Oracle (ORCL) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Growth And Capital Pressures
summary: Oracle's modeled fair value price target has been adjusted from US$255.31 to US$243.87, a trim that reflects the latest reassessment of the company in the wake of its sharp selloff. This move is consistent with broader Street research, where many analysts keep positive ratings while resetting price targets both higher and lower as they factor in cloud ambitions, AI exposure, and more cautious assumptions. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative may shape the way you track...

headline: Cloud AI Update - Osirus AI Unveils Comprehensive Enterprise AI Management Platform
summary: Osirus AI has launched a new unified platform designed for the comprehensive building, deploying, and management of enterprise AI agents. This platform consolidates various AI capabilities such as Chat, Search, Image, Video, Speech, and Storage, integrated with major AI providers like AWS Bedrock, Google, and OpenAI. Alongside this, Osirus AI introduces the Agent Studio, a system enabling organizations to manage AI agents efficiently with substantial control and scalability across business...

headline: Spinnaker Support Scales Executive Team to Fuel Next Phase of Global Expansion
summary: Spinnaker Support, the third-party software support leader entrusted by 1,000+ global clients, today announced the expansion of its executive leadership team with Pete Castello as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) and Belle Smith as Vice President of Global Marketing. headline: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Drivestream/
summary: Drivestream, a leading global provider of cloud services officially launches AiPEX University, a first-of-its-kind AI Experience Center designed specifically for Higher Education. Developed in strategic collaboration with Oracle and Higher Education customers across R1/R2, State and Community Colleges, public and private institutions, this initiative represents a uniquely radical shift in how colleges and universities interact with and deploy agentic artificial intelligence.

headline: Is Oracle (ORCL) Still Attractive After Its Strong 1 Year Share Price Rally
summary: If you are wondering whether Oracle's current share price offers good value, you are not alone. The answer depends on which valuation lens you use. Oracle's stock recently closed at US$177.58, with returns of 14.1% over 7 days, 18.6% over 30 days, a negative 9.3% year to date, and 46.0% over 1 year, which may signal changing views on both its growth potential and risk. Recent headlines have focused on Oracle's role in large scale cloud infrastructure projects and high profile partnerships,...
